subcodes.title: Words to Mr Kinney's students, spoken on 1912-12-04
subcodes.first_line: The object of reading and reciting is to understand the inner significance of the verses and mysteries of the Book. Had reading sufficed
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از تلاوت و قرائت پی بردن بحقائق آیات و اسرار کتابست اگر تنها خواندن بود بایستی ملت یهود جمیع مؤمن مسیح شده باشند
subcodes.subjects: @literal interpretation, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @outward and inward meanings, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
